# SPEC.md staged but never committed (no commit touches it) -> skipped, exit 0
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

# commit root.go only (SPEC.md left out of the commit)
exec git add pkg/root.go
exec git commit -m init

# now stage SPEC.md: ls-files lists it, but no commit touches it -> SpecUntracked
exec git add pkg/SPEC.md

psy check
stdout 'pkg: OK'
stdout 'SPEC.md not committed \(skipped\)'
stdout 'summary: 0 drift, 0 stale'

-- pkg/root.go --
package pkg
-- pkg/SPEC.md --
---
package: pkg
---

# 文件

- `root.go` — r
